expected_fix_summary: Free disk space on the host; need ~35GB for JetPack 6.x host components + downloads. Use --download-folder to point to a larger drive

expected_fix_summary: Another apt/dpkg process is running. Wait, or kill stale processes (sudo killall apt apt-get), then sudo rm /var/lib/dpkg/lock* and retry

expected_fix_summary: dpkg failed to configure nvidia-l4t-bsp. Run dpkg --configure -a on the target, or apt-get install -f to repair broken deps, then retry

expected_fix_summary: Hold REC button while powering on. Verify USB cable is on the OTG-capable port. lsusb should show 0955:7e19 (or similar) for Orin in recovery

expected_fix_summary: Bootloader / BootROM unresponsive. Power-cycle the board fully (unplug both USB and power), re-enter recovery, retry. If persistent, check board hardware

expected_fix_summary: Root filesystem mounted read-only. Run `mount -o remount,rw /` to fix; investigate why it dropped to RO (kernel panic? disk error?)
